name: cargo-bucket-deployment-prototype
description: Local prototype of a Rust-backed CDK bucket deployment construct

scripts.example:synth: pnpm build && RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=${RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN:-1.94.1-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu} pnpm exec cdk synth --app "node dist/examples/simple-app.js"
scripts.example:deploy: pnpm build && RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=${RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN:-1.94.1-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu} pnpm exec cdk deploy --app "node dist/examples/simple-app.js" --require-approval never
scripts.example:destroy: pnpm build && RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=${RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN:-1.94.1-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu} pnpm exec cdk destroy --app "node dist/examples/simple-app.js" --force
